message:
docs(sleep): clarify timer handle lifecycle in Sleep::poll

Add comments explaining the timer handle cancellation and re-registration
flow when a Sleep future migrates between timer drivers. The old handle
is consumed by cancel() and timer_handle becomes None; the subsequent
code path registers a fresh handle on the new driver. These comments
make the borrow-conflict workaround and the two-phase cancel+register
pattern easier to follow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
